parameters.content:
## 📌 ENTRY POINT — Google Form Trigger
This workflow starts when a new row is added to the **Form Responses 1** sheet (linked to your Google Form).

**Setup Required:**
- Replace the Sheet ID below with your own Google Sheet ID
- The form must collect: Invoice PDF URL, Industry, Destination Email, Expense Categories
- Sheet must be connected via Google Sheets Trigger OAuth2 credential

## ⚙️ SETUP REQUIRED — Google Sheets Trigger
Replace these values:
- `documentId` → Your Google Sheet ID
- `sheetName` (gid) → Your Form Responses sheet tab ID
- Credential → Connect your own Google Sheets OAuth2 account

## 📂 BRANCH — Loop Over Each PDF File
Each form submission may contain multiple PDF URLs (comma-separated).

- **Output 0 (done):** All files processed → Send Results Email
- **Output 1 (loop):** Still files remaining → Download next file

This SplitInBatches node processes one file at a time.

## ⚙️ SETUP REQUIRED — Gemini API Key
In the **Gemini Vision OCR** HTTP Request node:
- Replace `YOUR_GEMINI_API_KEY` in the URL with your actual key
- Get your key at: https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey
- Model used: `gemini-2.5-flash`

## ⚙️ SETUP REQUIRED — Output Google Sheet
In **Append row in sheet** node:
- Replace Sheet ID with your results sheet ID
- Ensure the sheet has these columns: `timestamp`, `industry`, `date_of_invoice`, `invoice_no`, `supplier_name`, `product`, `type_of_expenses`
- Connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential

## ⚠️ EDGE CASE — Multi-Product Invoices
The **Parse Invoice Fields** node splits invoices with multiple line items into separate rows — one row per product.

If Gemini returns an empty product list, a fallback row with `UNKNOWN` is written to prevent data loss.

Ensure your Expense Categories in the form match exactly what you want Gemini to classify into.

parameters.subject: =✅ Invoice Processing Complete — {{ $('Parse Invoice Fields').item.json.supplier_name }}
parameters.message:
=

✅ Invoice Processing Complete

Hi {{ $('Parse Invoice Fields').item.json.supplier_name }},

Your invoice files have been processed successfully. All extracted data has been logged to your Invoice Results sheet.

Supplier{{ $('Parse Invoice Fields').item.json.supplier_name }}
Industry{{ $('Parse Invoice Fields').item.json.industry }}
Processed At{{ $now }}

📊 Click here to view your Invoice Results

To download as Excel: File → Download → Microsoft Excel (.xlsx)


This email was sent automatically by your Invoice OCR system.
